name: kavox-server
description: KAVOX eCommerce API — All microservices via unified gateway

scripts.start:all: concurrently "npm run start:gateway" "npm run start:auth" "npm run start:product" "npm run start:order" "npm run start:payment" "npm run start:qikink" "npm run start:search" "npm run start:recommendation" "npm run start:seller" "npm run start:admin"
scripts.dev:all: concurrently "nodemon gateway/index.js" "nodemon microservices/auth/auth.service.js" "nodemon microservices/product/product.service.js" "nodemon microservices/order/order.service.js" "nodemon microservices/payment/payment.service.js" "nodemon microservices/qikink/qikink.service.js" "nodemon microservices/search/search.service.js" "nodemon microservices/recommendation/recommendation.service.js" "nodemon microservices/seller/seller.service.js" "nodemon microservices/admin/admin.service.js"
